templates.name: revenue_by_product
templates.description: Get total revenue for a specific product over a time period
templates.sql_template: SELECT product, SUM(revenue) as total_revenue, SUM(units_sold) as total_units FROM apple_sales_fact WHERE product = :product AND date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date GROUP BY product
example_queries: What was iPhone revenue last quarter?
Show me iPad sales for 2024
How much revenue did Mac generate this year?

templates.name: revenue_by_region
templates.description: Get revenue breakdown by geographic region for a time period
templates.sql_template: SELECT region, SUM(revenue) as total_revenue, SUM(units_sold) as total_units FROM apple_sales_fact WHERE date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date GROUP BY region ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
example_queries: Show revenue by region last quarter
Which region had the highest sales this year?
Break down revenue by country

templates.name: product_revenue_by_region
templates.description: Get revenue for a specific product in a specific region
templates.sql_template: SELECT product, region, SUM(revenue) as total_revenue, SUM(units_sold) as total_units FROM apple_sales_fact WHERE product = :product AND region = :region AND date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date GROUP BY product, region
example_queries: What was iPhone revenue in India last quarter?
Show me iPad sales in Europe this year
How much did Mac generate in North America?

templates.name: top_products_by_revenue
templates.description: Get top N products by revenue for a time period
templates.sql_template: SELECT product, SUM(revenue) as total_revenue, SUM(units_sold) as total_units FROM apple_sales_fact WHERE date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date GROUP BY product ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10
example_queries: What are the top products by revenue?
Show me best selling products last quarter
Which products generated the most revenue?

templates.name: revenue_trend_by_month
templates.description: Get monthly revenue trend for a product
templates.sql_template: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', date) as month, SUM(revenue) as monthly_revenue FROM apple_sales_fact WHERE product = :product AND date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', date) ORDER BY month
example_queries: Show iPhone revenue trend by month
What's the monthly sales pattern for iPad?
Display quarterly revenue for Mac

templates.name: customer_segment_analysis
templates.sql_template: SELECT customer_segment, SUM(revenue) as total_revenue, SUM(units_sold) as total_units, COUNT(DISTINCT date) as transaction_days FROM apple_sales_fact WHERE date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date GROUP BY customer_segment ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
example_queries: Show revenue by customer segment
Which customer segment generates most revenue?
Compare consumer vs enterprise sales

templates.name: daily_sales_summary
templates.description: Get daily sales summary for a specific date
templates.sql_template: SELECT date, product, region, SUM(revenue) as total_revenue, SUM(units_sold) as total_units FROM apple_sales_fact WHERE date = :target_date GROUP BY date, product, region ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
example_queries: Show me sales for yesterday
What were the sales today?
Display yesterday's revenue

templates.name: year_over_year_comparison
templates.description: Compare current year revenue to previous year
templates.sql_template: SELECT YEAR(date) as year, SUM(revenue) as total_revenue FROM apple_sales_fact WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 2 YEAR) GROUP BY YEAR(date) ORDER BY year
example_queries: Compare this year to last year
Show year over year growth
How does this year compare to last year?
